perkfromtheshadows.e: Hide in the shadows 13% more effectively, noises from actions are muffled 10%, and sneak movement is 10% faster. Enemies will search for you for up to 50 seconds.
Hide in the shadows 26% more effectively, noises from actions are muffled 20% and sneak movement is 20% faster. Enemies will search for you for up to 40 seconds.
Hide in the shadows 39% more effectively, noises from actions are muffled 30%, and sneak movement is 30% faster. Enemies will search for you for up to 30 seconds.
Hide in the shadows 52% more effectively, noises from actions are muffled 40%, and sneak movement is 40% faster. Enemies will search for you for up to 25 seconds.
Hide in the shadows 65% more effectively, noises from actions are muffled 50% and sneak movement is 50% faster. Enemies will search for you for up to 20 seconds.

perkelectrocutioner.e: Where are the instructions? You're smart, but remember to point it away from you and pull the trigger. All batons deal 10% more damage. Stun batons electrify victims 20% longer. Stamina costs are reduced by 8% and 15% for power attacks. Find more batons and parts in loot.

You're getting the hang of using batons to incapacitate your enemies. All batons deal 20% more damage. Stun batons electrify victims 40% longer. Stamina costs are reduced by 15% and 30% for power attacks. Find more batons and parts in loot.

You're getting dangerous with batons. You could probably knock out cattle if the zombies hadn't eaten them all. All batons deal 30% more damage. Stun batons electrify victims 60% longer. Stamina costs are reduced by 20% and 40% for power attacks. Killing blows grant 10 stamina. Find more batons and parts in loot.

You're lethal with batons. All batons deal 40% more damage. Stun batons electrify victims 80% longer. Stamina costs are reduced by 25% and 50% for power attacks. Killing blows grant 20 stamina. Find more batons and parts in loot.
You're the last thing they see coming and an executioner with batons. All batons deal 50% more damage. Stun batons electrify victims 100% longer. Killing blows grant 30 stamina.

perkturrets.e: You have some crazy innovative ideas but your implementation could use some work. Robotic weapons deal 10% more damage, 30% faster fire rate and reload an extra 10 rounds. Robot active range is increased from 10 to 14 meters. You can deploy multiple robots but only the closest will be active.
You are taking your projects to the next level now. Robotic weapons deal 20% more damage, 70% faster fire rate and reload an extra 20 rounds. Robot active range is 15 meters.
You have mastered the basics of automated weaponry. Robotic weapons deal 30% more damage, 90% faster fire rate and reload an extra 30 rounds. Robot active range is 16 meters.

You must be from the year 2077. You are creating some futuristic technology. Robotic weapons deal 40% more damage, 150% faster fire rate and reload an extra 40 rounds. Reload robotic weapons 10% faster. Robot active range is 17 meters.
You are now a top expert in robotics. Reload robotic weapons 20% faster and reload an extra 50 rounds. Robot active range is 18 meters. Two deployed robots can be active at once.

perkcalculatedattack.e: It's as simple as basic math. Attack speeds with batons are 5% faster.
You see even quicker routes to success. Attack speeds with batons are 10% faster.
Every strike is perfectly calculated for speed and impact. Attack speeds with batons are 15% faster.
Predict and use your enemies' movements against them. Attack speeds with batons are 20% faster.
Attacks so fast, even physics can't keep up. Attack speeds with batons are 25% faster.

perkbetterbarter.e: You are good at wheeling and dealing and never pay full price for anything. Get a 5% better deal buying and selling merchandise with traders.
You must have been a salesman before the apocalypse with the kind of good deals you find. Get a 10% better deal buying and selling with traders.
You act like a sales manager and have authority to cut the best deals. Get a 15% better deal buying and selling with traders.
You would do well if the stock market still existed. Get a 20% better deal buying and selling with traders.
You are like a Corporate Manager and buy goods at the lowest prices and sell for a huge profit. Get a 25% better deal buying and selling with traders.

perkdaringadventurer.e: Risking your neck every day has its advantages. Gain access to better trader items and get 5% more dukes.
The traders know you can get the job done, plunderer. Gain access to better trader items and get 10% more dukes.
You've made a name for yourself as a mercenary for hire. Gain access to better trader items and get 15% more dukes.
If there's a job that pays, you're the first in line. Gain access to better trader items and get 20% more dukes.
You are the daring adventurer! Gain access to better trader items and get 25% more dukes. Pick two quest rewards for your daring efforts.

perkcharismaticnature.e: People find your survival stories inspiring. Allies and Party Members regenerate lost health 50% faster.
You're a team leader that empowers others. Allies and Party Members gain 20% more Block and Melee Damage.
You're a strong motivational force. Allies and Party Members take 10% less damage from all sources, take half damage from bleeding and stop bleeding twice as fast.
Your leadership abilities are top shelf. Allies and Party Members find 10% better loot.
You're a true hero. Allies and Party Members find 20% better loot and gain +1 to all attributes.

perkphysician.e: Treated Critical injuries heal 15% faster. Medical healing items heal 25% more health over time. Gain 100% more XP using bandages, first aid bandages, first aid kits and splints. Splints and Casts cure sprains instantly.

Treated Critical injuries heal 25% faster. Medical healing items heal 50% more health over time. Gain 200% more XP using bandages, first aid bandages, first aid kits and splints. Craft items in the Chemistry Station 20% faster.

Treated Critical injuries heal 50% faster. Medical healing items heal 100% more health over time. Gain 500% more XP using bandages, first aid bandages, first aid kits and splints. Casts cure broken limbs instantly.
Your medical knowledge makes removing limbs a breeze! Gain an additional 20% chance to dismember enemies with batons. Craft items in the Chemistry Station 40% faster.
Use your knowledge of medicine to save lives, or end them. Each blow landed with a stun baton has a 10% chance for instant death.

perkadvancedengineering.e: You are now out of the stone age and an apprentice Engineer! Gain 15% XP from electrical trap kills. Items craft 20% faster at the forge. Craft glue cheaper.
The long hours tinkering on projects is starting to pay dividends! Gain 30% XP from electrical trap kills. Items craft 20% faster at workbenches and cement mixers.

You really know your way around the workshop and can build about anything you set your mind to! Gain 45% XP from electrical trap kills. All forge recipes cost 10% less, crafting Forged Steel and electrical devices costs 15% less.

You are the da Vinci of the apocalypse with all your amazing inventions! Gain 60% XP from electrical trap kills. All forge recipes cost 15% less, crafting Forged Steel and electrical devices costs 25% less.
You are now an Advanced Engineer and would make MacDyver jealous. Gain 75% XP from electrical trap kills. All forge recipes cost 20% less, crafting Forged Steel and electrical devices costs 35% less.

perkgreasemonkey.e: Your passion to tinker and not walk everywhere has led you on the path of the bicycle mechanic. Craft wheels and bicycle parts 33% cheaper. Repair kits are 10 percent more effective on vehicles.
Why pedal everywhere when there is enough junk lying around to make a minibike? Craft minibike parts 33% cheaper. Repair kits are 20 percent more effective on vehicles.
It was only a matter of time before going faster and carrying more gear was a necessity. Craft motorcycle parts 33% cheaper. Repair kits are 30 percent more effective on vehicles.
Nothing beats the safety and warmth of a nice 4x4 truck. Craft 4x4 truck parts 33% cheaper. Repair kits are 40 percent more effective on vehicles.

Your tinkering desire is never satisfied and only a true genius could figure out how to take to the skies with scrap iron. Craft gyrocopter parts 33% cheaper. Repair kits are 50 percent more effective on vehicles.

perkintellectmastery.e: Vehicles take 20% less damage and consume 20% less fuel.
Adds a 25% chance to find a book, magazine, or schematic in loot.
Adds a 50% chance to gain 2 skill points when reading magazines.
Stun batons only take 2 hits to charge.

perklightarmor.e: Can withstand some stress, but requires care. Reduce durability use by 15%. Gain +1 Armor Rating for each piece of Light Armor equipped. Find more armor, armor parts, and legendary parts in loot.
Holds up well under normal conditions. Reduce durability use by 30%. Gain +2 Armor Rating for each piece of Light Armor equipped. Find more armor, armor parts, and legendary parts in loot.
Strengthened to resist damage. Reduce durability use by 45%. Gain +3 Armor Rating for each piece of Light Armor equipped. Find more armor, armor parts, and legendary parts in loot.
Proven to endure extreme conditions. Reduce durability use by 60%. Gain +4 Armor Rating for each piece of Light Armor equipped. Find more armor, armor parts, and legendary parts in loot.

perkmediumarmor.e: You have started on the path of the moderately armored warrior. Reduce medium armor movement penalty by 15% and stamina penalty by 10%. Reduce durability use by 15%. Find more armor, armor parts, and legendary parts in loot.

You've survived some battles and hope to be a knight one day. Reduce medium armor movement penalty by 30% and stamina penalty by 20%. Reduce durability use by 30%. Find more armor, armor parts, and legendary parts in loot.

All the hard training and battles have paid off, you are now a knight. Reduce medium armor movement penalty by 50% and stamina penalty by 35%. Reduce durability use by 45%. Find more armor, armor parts, and legendary parts in loot.

You have made a name for yourself and are feared by nearly all as you are now a gladiator. Reduce medium armor movement penalty by 75% and stamina penalty by 50%. Reduce durability use by 60%. Find more armor, armor parts, and legendary parts in loot.

perkheavyarmor.e: You might move a little awkward in heavy armor, but you're alive to talk about it. Reduce heavy armor movement and stamina penalty by 5%. Reduce durability use by 15%. Find more armor, armor parts, and legendary parts in loot.
You can take a hit! Reduce heavy armor movement and stamina penalty by 10%. Reduce durability use by 30%. Find more armor, armor parts, and legendary parts in loot.
Now we're talking about some serious protection. Reduce heavy armor movement and stamina penalty by 17%. Reduce durability use by 45%. Find more armor, armor parts, and legendary parts in loot.
You are now a walking tank. Reduce heavy armor movement and stamina penalty by 25%. Reduce durability use by 60%. Find more armor, armor parts, and legendary parts in loot.

perkmasterchef.e: Cooking is not your thing, but you know some basics. Use 20% less of a recipe's main ingredients. Cook 40% faster. Find more cooking magazines and ingredients in loot.

Don't let good food go to waste! Adds a chance to find salvageable food in dumpsters. Adds a chance to find more seeds in dumpsters. Cook 60% faster. Find even more cooking magazines and ingredients in loot.
Cooking for an Army? Use 40% less of a recipe's main ingredients. Cook 80% faster. Find even more cooking magazines and ingredients in loot.

perklivingofftheland.e: Double the harvest of wild or planted crops. Farm plots cost 30% less to craft.
50% chance to harvest 1 additional crop. Farm plots cost 50% less to craft.
Triple the harvest of wild or planted crops.

perklockpicking.e: Burglar. You are starting to make a name for yourself. You can pick locks 20% faster and have a 10% lower chance to break lockpicks.
You are now a lock smith and few locks will keep you out. You can pick locks 40% faster and have a 20% lower chance to break lockpicks. Find 1 extra lockpick when they are found in loot.
You are now a world class safe cracker. Pick locks 60% faster and have a 30% lower chance to break lockpicks. Find 2 extra lockpicks when they are found in loot.

perkluckylooter.e: You've got a slim chance to find better loot. Adds 5% to loot bonus for containers that you open personally. Looting is 10% faster.
Your luck is improving and no matter where you look you seem to find something good. Adds 10% to loot bonus. Looting is 20% faster.
Adds 15% to loot bonus. Looting is 40% faster.
You just seem to be blessed with finding great loot everywhere you look. Adds 20% to loot bonus. Looting is 60% faster.
The Lucky Looter. You are on a roll and the dice are loaded. Adds 25% to loot bonus. Looting is 80% faster.
